name: Fat-Free Fantasy Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix cocoa, salt, and sugar together.
2. Add milk and corn syrup to the mixture.
3. Boil until it forms a soft ball in cold water.
4. Turn off heat and beat well with a hand mixer until thickened.
5. Stir in Grape-Nuts and vanilla.
6. Spray a 9-inch glass baking dish with non-fat cooking spray.
7. Pour fudge into the dish and let harden.
8. Cut into squares when set.
